We have shoe data, so we need 3 sections: "Your Foot Shape", "What Your Current Shoe Fit Tells Us", "What to Look For". Each paragraph is a plain string, no markdown, no bullet points. Must be array of objects each with title and paragraphs (array of strings). Then recommendations array of 6 objects with slug, brand, model, why (2-4 sentences), recommended_size_eu (number or null), size_note (string). Must ensure brand diversity across 6 picks. Must match gender: female user, prefer women's shoes. Must match skill level and use case to user's preference (comfort). Must not recommend both standard and LV/HV variant of same shoe. Must not use em dashes; only hyphens. Must not fabricate numbers; must use actual scan data numbers. Must match by slug from database.

We need to compute recommended size using formula: recommended_size = user_anchor_size + (anchor_brand_typical_downsize - target_brand_typical_downsize).
